hero.bio: On a joyful autopilot with curiosity. Turning raw numbers into insight, one commit at a time.

paragraphs: Hi — I'm Rohit. I navigate the world of data with enthusiasm and a learner's spirit. Whether it's wrangling datasets, building ETL pipelines, or diving into statistics, I find joy in turning raw numbers into insight.
Currently on a 100-day challenge — pushing myself academically, physically, and creatively. Every day is a new commit in the story of becoming better.
